description_long: This is a weathered, upright gravestone made of light-colored stone, featuring a rounded top and a rectangular base. The front face is adorned with an ornate floral relief at the arch, and an inscription panel with engraved text, though the text is partially eroded and difficult to read. The stone shows signs of age, with some moss or lichen growth near the base and minor chipping along the edges. The back is plain and unadorned, with a smooth, slightly stained surface. The base is slightly wider than the main shaft and appears to be set into a small patch of earth or grass. The overall appearance suggests it is a traditional memorial marker, likely found in a cemetery or park.
description: A weathered, upright gravestone with a rounded top, ornate floral relief, and engraved inscription on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate floral relief, engraved inscription, and some moss at the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the stone and the protruding base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, smooth, and unadorned surface with some discoloration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the stone's thickness and the base's extension.
attribute_inscription: There is an engraved inscription on the front face, written in English, with serif-style lettering. The text is partially eroded and not fully legible.
attribute_ornamentation: A detailed floral relief is present at the arch of the front face, featuring carved leaves and flowers in a classical style.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular, slightly wider than the shaft, and appears to be made of the same stone. It is simple, with minor chipping and some moss growth at the edges.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded and smoothly finished, with the floral relief extending just below the arch. No additional decorations are present at the tip.
attribute_surrounding_features: Some patches of grass and earth are visible at the base, with minor debris and moss. No other notable surrounding features.
